Validation Study Hub

Progressive disclosure — user-validated performance studies

PerformancepureLiFi × Fraunhofer Institute · May 2026

Validated 10 Gbps Peak Throughput in Dense Office Deployment

Independent lab validation achieved consistent 10 Gbps symmetric throughput across 40 luminaire nodes in a 1,200 m² open-plan office environment with zero packet degradation.

SecurityUK Ministry of Defence · Apr 2026

LiFi Signal Containment Verification — Classified Zone Trials

Empirical containment tests confirmed zero RF signal propagation beyond designated perimeter in 100% of trials across 12 test configurations.

HealthcareNHS Digital Innovation Hub · Mar 2026

LiFi Interference Assessment in Surgical Environments

Zero electromagnetic interference detected across 34 connected medical devices during simultaneous 1 Gbps data transfer in active operating theatre.
